verdict.rationale: The Q4 2025 operations review explicitly states no quarterly gross logo churn metric was approved for this review cycle, and the customer appendix provides only segment customer/ARR counts with no churn figure, so no vault span confirms or even states the claimed 3.1% value.
verdict.suggested_action: Confirm with revenue operations whether a Q4 2025 gross logo churn figure (3.1%) was produced outside the reviewed customer appendix and ops review; if not, the master claim should be retracted or flagged as unsupported.
